prompt: Northern Song Dynasty Chinese ink wash landscape painting (Shanshui) style. A vast mountain landscape with layered peaks fading into mist. Along a winding path across the mountains, a sequence of small human figures appears, each progressively lighter and less defined than the previous one. The first figure is rendered in dark, bold ink, while each subsequent figure fades in intensity until the last is barely visible, blending into the mist. Expressive brush strokes, soft ink wash gradients, large areas of empty space, atmospheric perspective. Monochrome ink tones on rice paper texture. No text, no labels, no modern elements, no sharp outlines, no photographic realism.
tradition_approach: Used ink wash gradients, atmospheric perspective, and sequential travelers along a winding path to represent iterative descent toward an optimum.
